free_text: Level density parameter in exotic nuclei of mass A~80
from proton and alpha evaporation spectra
14UD BARC-TIFR Pelletron
A self-supporting rolled 58Ni (99.9% enriched) target
of thickness 0.3 mg/cm2.
Protons were detected in a silicon
surface barrier delta E-E detector telescope of
thicknesses 150 um and 2 mm placed inside 1 m-diameter
scattering chamber. Alpha particles were detected in
two other telescopes with E-detector thickness of 1 mm
and delta E-detector thicknesses of 30 and 47 um. The
geometrical solid angles of all the three detectors
were about 9 msr. The detectors were placed at various
angles between 100 degree and 160 degree.
Aman Sharma and VT
No detail information on sources of
uncertainties.
